I do use it a lot in ghost of tabor and it’s great but if you could collab with other games such as green shell vr or contractors showdown it would really help with more vr users having a larger scale of experiences
Super vest 👌 love the quality and it is surprising comfy there really isn't a lot of games compatible with it.But overall I give it 4  stars

reviews.review_title: No Updates, lots of big VR Titels unsupp
reviews.review_description:
I own the Bhaptics Pro Vest for nearly a year now and i must say the vest i great, but not for native VR.....
Why?
Because many of the big VR Titels are unsupported... Batman, Asgard's Wrath 2, Green Hell VR...or... they are broken like
Onward, Blade and Sorcery Nomad or Guardians Frontline
and there are absolutely now updates in sight....

Unfortunately, the audio-to-haptic function offers no alternative, as the vest reacts to EVERY sound and you get a continuous massage...

So, anyone considering investing several hundred dollars or euros in a VR vest to play the best native VR titles should think twice... The situation is quite different for PCVR. .
the haptics on this thing is crazy i can feel anything and everything
Its Needs population one! game on this & more games.

reviews.review_title: Player connect to bhaptic suit x40
reviews.review_description:
Great compatibility, straight forward design 
Detected the vest in Bluetooth, connected it with no issues whatsoever 
Works flawlessly, I did not run into any issue, all I did was follow the detailed guide which was shipped with the vest 
Appreciate the developer, 

Best of luck
I love the haptic vest and everything but I’m 13 so I can’t play rated m games so I would appreciate if you add a different games ￼like contractors showdown

I have Bhaptic loaded in on apps  but wont let me log into with info i set up but my Tac suit is working and connected  to my Q3

I got a be haptic vest x16 I thought it was totally broken until I downloaded this app it helped me connect to the vest had many difficulties trying it without it for anyone who may be having difficulties connecting to the question via Bluetooth download this app otherwise they may keep telling you that it's connected when it's not this app allows you to play with the components activate the suit and feel the vibration actually working through the quest to it will automatically pair up with the quest once the app is downloaded and you begin to go through the tutorial motions thank you again be haptics for the amazing experience and VR to the amazing technology of haptics

reviews.review_title: sensitive to sound but still works
reviews.review_description: The suit works well but you have to connect with the cable, not Bluetooth. It works with all apps that work with the suit but you can’t use Bluetooth. If you use the cable you have to wear headphones otherwise there won’t be any sound cause u gotta connect the suit to the headphones outlet. It’s very sensitive to sound but it works very well.
Simply does not work! Waste of time & money in an age where both are hard to come by.
I can not pair my bHaptics suit The only way it will pair is through the app and when I exit out the app, it will unpair I got this suit today I was really excited to play on it please fix it.

U need to fix ur app it connects in the app and works perfectly when I play games in the manager app but if I try to play one of my actual games that I know are compatible it not work it does not work when u exit the app so could u try to fix it I have been waiting to try it out I tryed fixing it for five days and then figured out it’s the app that is broken

The bHaptics vest truly takes VR gaming to an entirely whole new level of immersion that’s really out of this world. I admit when I first got it I was extremely disappointed when I couldn’t get it to work with Thrill of the Fight given that imo it’s the best game to test it’s immersion capabilities and for a day or two I couldn’t help but wonder if the vest was defective but then again the fact that it worked perfectly well with the bHaptics demos and Epic Roller Coasters that quickly assured me that it definitely works. Eventually out of desperation and unwillingness to accept that the x40 is simply incompatible with TOTF as well as getting tired of waiting that I finally searched online on how to get it to work and a few days ago I finally found the answer I was looking for and who knew it’s only as simple as going to the version in the description to enable the bHaptics that allowed the game to finally recognize the new TactSuit vest, and I’m extremely thrilled (no pun intended 🤣) to finally get to use it when playing TOTF which is the main reason/game why I couldn’t resist getting the vest in the first place. Of course, I’ve been using it with all the other natively supported Quest 2 games that I already have for over 2 months and it blows my mind every single time that I get to use it, because it truly brings you into the game like no other. It’s one thing to see, hear and feel the haptics from the controllers which are already impressively immersive as is, but when you add the haptic vest to that mix the immersion experience just becomes truly mind boggling and addicting at the same time. Before I often find it disheartening whenever I see the vest being supported by Stream and Rift but not the Quest especially for the games I already have which I can only imagine would make the experience so much more exhilarating than it already is, but thankfully once again out of pure luck I accidentally stumble across the AtH profiles that finally allowed me to play with those games and pretty much any game I want for that matter with the haptic vest and that was extremely exciting for me, because now there’s literally no longer any limit on which games I can use the vest for rather it’s more like which games do I really want to use it on and which ones are best not to, because let’s face it there are some games that are better played without it especially when the freedom of movement is absolutely essential to genuinely enjoy and experience the game as intended by the devs like Dance Central, Just Hoops and workout games to name a few that I wouldn’t really want to use the vest although I did try which validated my personal opinion/preference not to use it on those games. Otherwise I extremely enjoy using it with majority of the games I own especially now that I’ve discovered that I can practically use it with any game I want using the AtH profiles for the games that are currently not natively supported for the Quest, so the sky is truly the limit.

Thank you so much bHaptics for making these amazing haptics peripheral devices available to us which remarkably boost the VR gaming immersion out of this world and pulls us into the VR world by allowing us to really experience and feel what we previously could only see, hear and feel through the haptics from the controllers. Your product literally brought an entirely new meaning to the word immersion and wish you won’t get tired of adding more supported games for the different gaming platforms. Cheers to your continued success! 🍻🎉

And a special shout out to Nickbond, Bigskunkynugz, Floh, Purplemikey, AWH and everyone who continuously share their AtH profiles through the bHaptics app for everybody to enjoy. Thank you so very much for sharing these exceptional profiles that truly enable us to truly enjoy the bHaptics vest like never before. 🙏🏻🤩💐

reviews.review_title: Easier than ever to use bHaptics
reviews.review_description: The bHaptics team is constantly adapting to the VR landscape and has just taken a huge step forward in making haptic devices even easier to use for Oculus Quest owners. No more sideloading!

It only works with the bhaptics app. Can even get the audio-haptics to work. This thing is a piece of crap. Maybe bhaptics can contact me to help me make my kid's Christmas present work before I hit the "return" button.

reviews.review_title: Quest 2 NO Game works, yet App is fine..
reviews.review_description: As you can see from some of the more recent reviews the bHaptics App has become a brick sitting in the Quest 2 VR Headset.  The App itself will install and the internal Manager operates as expected but I was unable to get any game, at all, to operate the Tactsuit x40 Vest in any way without having to hardline the Aux Audio-Direct from the sound output of the headset into the vest input.  Nearly $600 for these items and they take a working earlier version of the app and utterly destroy any point in the purchase, leaving the dead app here on the store for more than 6 months without correcting the issue.  I guess I will be returning the x40 vest since bHaptics cares so little about selling a working product.

This app is meant to be used with bhaptics gear. If you do not own their product make sure to check them out on their website (Google will help you finding them as I'm not sure if can paste link here).

The bhaptics gear provide a new depth of immersion to the already immersive experience that is VR. This app allows user to connect easily and benefit from the bhaptics gear in supported games. To find the list of supported games head over bhaptics website and click on experiences, VR and then select the oculus quest in the devices list.

Enjoy!

reviews.review_title: It is not in the oculus store ..
reviews.review_description:
NEW: ***
Had to update my Quest, try different smartphones just to connect my phone to my Quest to reactivate developer mode to make "sidequest" work, find out how to install apps from "Applab" just to find out that many of the advertises apps just don´t work at the moment due to SDK update.. , for example those I own. Now I have to  wait, to hope and to read more stuff to be able to install the mods for other games to be able to play more than one or two games I would like to.
Somehow I´ts cool and haptic and listening to musi on headphones and feel the bass is somehow cool.. but bad latency, so just slow music.. but it feels still very experimental like VR some Years ago. So be aware that it is no way something like plug and play at the moment and the price.. hmmm.. But Yes..   it adds something if it´s working.

OLD: *
I tried to find the bHaptics Player in the oculus-app-store and just couldn´t find it. Can also not install it from oculus.com ...  Sidelink does not recognise my Quest and now i´ts just not possible to use my Tactsuit as wanted. Have not the time to try for more hours.. Now thinking about sending the vest back. Audio to haptic hast, in my opinion, to much latency and also not working somehow.. ( just tested it with audiofiles ).

Was so excited to buy and get my vest, only to be extremely let down and frustrated. I have always had the hardest time getting this to work properly with the quest 2 since day 1. I'll never understand why we have to go through a separate app to get this to pair with the headset. The old app before this could detect my suit and I can ping it, but as soon as I leave to start a game it disconnects and says there are no paired devices. This new updated app is even worse because no matter what I do, it will not detect my suit at all when it is flashing trying to pair. It won't show up under the list of available devices and I can not pair through the headset settings as well. Out of about 100 times of trying to use this with VR. It's only worked properly as intended maybe 5 times, and that's being generous. Very discouraging and upsetting. These cost a lot of money and bhaptics should make sure they have things like this worked out well in advance before having the right to sell them at the amount that they do. I hope I can get some help someday, so far support has not done much at all.
Very nice
My vest just stop working after I downloaded the update I had to do on your app now my best won’t even turn on and I can’t speak to a human about this problem
Just an endless loading screen. Tried to reinstall, reboot quest.
The bHaptics x40 is the coolest thing you can buy for VR. Insanely impressive and easy to set up. A must have for a True VR enthusiast.

developer_response.body: Thanks Korben.Dallas365! Our team will keep trying to bring the most immersive experience throgh our hatpic devices.

reviews.review_description: I got the tactsuit X40 from bHaptics and connected it to my quest 2 right away. Back when the bHaptics app was the original version it worked everytime, no problem. I don't know what's happened since then but I haven't been able to get the suit to function at all in game. I can (kinda) pair the vest to the quest to get a solid blue light. But I have to go into my settings and have the quest 2 "forget" the vest as a previously paired device. When I reconnect it, it pairs just fine but this app will not and even outright refuses to detect anything associated with the vest. Honestly, it's really disappointing because when it worked it was one of the most immersive experiences I've ever had. Please bHaptics fix this.
